sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check where the orange/blue block is now vs before
ascii_before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
ascii_after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Find orange block position
def find_orange(lines):
    for i, line in enumerate(lines):
        if 'O' in line:
            cols = [j for j, c in enumerate(line) if c == 'O']
            return i, min(cols), max(cols)
    return None

print(f"Orange before: {find_orange(ascii_before)}")
print(f"Orange after: {find_orange(ascii_after)}")

# Also check yellow bar
def count_yellow(lines):
    count = 0
    for line in lines:
        count += line.count('Y')
    return count

print(f"Yellow count before: {count_yellow(ascii_before)}")
print(f"Yellow count after: {count_yellow(ascii_after)}")

# Show the block area
print("\n=== Block area now ===")
for i in range(44, 50):
    print(f"{i}: {ascii_after[i][30:44]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
